string.text: Escape the Valley
The military have blocked the road to the Garbage. According to Sidorovich, it's possible to leave the Dark Valley via the southern road.
Rescue the Duty member
The Duty stalker Bullet is asking for help rescuing his partner from the bandits.
Retrieve the keycard from Borov
To access the lab, I need two electronic keycards. One was given to me by the Barman, but the other must be taken from the bandit leader known as Borov.
Enter Lab X-18
I have the second key. Now I need to find the entrance to the lab.
Find documents in X-18
I need to find documents related to the experiments conducted in Lab X-18. These documents might shed light on how the Brain Scorcher works.
Deliver the documents to the Barman
I’ve found the necessary documents from Lab X-18. I need to bring them to the Barman.
Find the documents in the underground lab.
Take the key to the lab from Borov.
Get out of the bandit base.
Find the entrance to the lab.
Sneak into the base.
Find the documents in X18.
Find the documents.
Bring the documents to the Barkeep.
Find the codelocked door.
Discover the code that opens the door.
Open the door using the code.
Open the door to the control center.
Discover the code that opens the door.
Open the door using the code.
Free the Duty member.
Follow Bullet to the ambush location.
Kill the bandits and rescue the Duty member.
Return to the trader.
Return to the trader.
Get out of the Dark Valley.
Show documents to the trader.
Free the Duty member from prison.
Pull the Duty member out of the bandit prison.
Free the Duty member from the bandit prison.
